name: Permian World
description: Adds Permian era creatures, prehistoric harvest materials, and craftable prehistoric gear to Cataclysm Dark Days Ahead. Includes biome spawn groups, lifecycle content, prehistoric materials and map specials. Adds custom starts, scenarios, and themed professions. Adds regional loot groups for nests, bone fields, predator dens, badlands, and rocky uplands. Expanded with an extra wave of small reptiles, mid-tier hunters, giant herbivores, apex predators, and swamp monsters. Full lifecycle update adds juvenile forms and reproduction across the broader creature roster. Expanded hide crafting adds new prehistoric hide clothing and utility wearables. Hideworking now uses a proper cure-to-tan processing chain for prehistoric hides instead of a shortcut drying step. Adds defended egg nests, egg-laying reproduction for designated species, and a JSON incubation-to-hatching loop for carried eggs. Phase 2A begins the expanded resource economy with new biome materials, fossil resources, webbing and venom drops, and richer regional loot. Phase 2B adds a deeper prehistoric material processing chain with hardened hides, stitched hide panels, bone blanks and plates, drilled scutes, layered scale panels, cleaned webbing, woven web cord, sailcloth patches, and membrane wraps. Phase 2C expands crafting with heavier hide gear, scute armor, and utility camp items like satchels, bedrolls, rugs, trophy racks, fossil displays, and woven nest baskets. Adds a dedicated Phase 2C 32x32 tilesheet for the new camp utility and advanced crafting items.
